description: Template fixed-copy cleanup records for production templates whose visual structure is useful but whose source sample text is not fully slot-modeled yet.

channel_cover_v1.quality_note: Generic cover tagline is treated as removable template copy until the cover receives explicit tagline slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Cover tagline should become an editable subtitle/tagline slot.
Cover category strip should be editable, not inherited from the source template.

service_components_v1.quality_note: Signal-product service copy remains as fixed shapes around useful card slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Section title is duplicated by editable title slots.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: 맞춤형 개발 가능한 Add Signal Data
cleanup_patterns.reason: Source product claim is unrelated to generic business drafts.
Static source-template data claim can leak into non-sentiment decks.
Static source-template signal claim can leak into unrelated decks.
Static investment workflow claim is not safe for generic output.
Source-template summary sentence is not editable yet.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: DATA FIRST, PROBLEMS SOLVED, BOOST EVERYTHING.
cleanup_patterns.reason: Template marketing slogan should not survive into generated decks.

core_technology_v1.quality_note: Technology proof layout has fixed data-platform claims that are removed until converted to slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static source-template accuracy claim is unrelated to many industries.
Static source-template data-source claim is not safe by default.
Static scraping-engine claim should be editable before reuse.
Static preprocessing claim is not generally valid.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: DATA FIRST, PROBLEMS SOLVED, BOOST EVERYTHING.
cleanup_patterns.reason: Template marketing slogan should not survive into generated decks.

proof_metrics_v1.quality_note: Metric slide has static ETF/source/disclaimer copy; keep layout but remove claims unless chart slots own the content.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static market proof claim should not appear without source data.
Source disclaimer is tied to the original finance sample.
Static market explanation is not generic proof content.
Static signal explanation is not generic proof content.
Static API claim is not safe without explicit intake support.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: DATA FIRST, PROBLEMS SOLVED, BOOST EVERYTHING.
cleanup_patterns.reason: Template marketing slogan should not survive into generated decks.

alpha_signal_timeline_v1.quality_note: Timeline structure is useful, but finance signal copy needs slot modeling before production reuse.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static finance headline leaks source-template story.
Static signal subhead leaks source-template story.
Static comparison label belongs to the original sample.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: 투자 전략에 즉시 적용 가능한 Clean Data
cleanup_patterns.reason: Static recommendation bullet is not generic.
Static portfolio metric claim is not generic.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: DATA FIRST, PROBLEMS SOLVED, BOOST EVERYTHING.
cleanup_patterns.reason: Template marketing slogan should not survive into generated decks.

finance_closing_v1.quality_note: Closing slide has finance-specific CTA and legal copy that are removed until modeled as explicit contact/disclaimer slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static CTA belongs to the source finance sample.
Static legal disclaimer should be supplied by deck content, not template residue.
Static company disclaimer is source-template copy.

cleanup_patterns.pattern: DATA FIRST, PROBLEMS SOLVED, BOOST EVERYTHING.
cleanup_patterns.reason: Template marketing slogan should not survive into generated decks.
Static page-number residue should be replaced by future footer/page-number modeling.

project_case_v2.quality_note: Portfolio case template includes personal SaaS project copy outside named slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static personal portfolio project copy is unrelated to travel drafts.
Static execution claim belongs to the original portfolio sample.
Static SaaS implementation detail belongs to the original portfolio sample.
Static CTA belongs to the original portfolio sample.

improvement_case_v1.quality_note: Improvement case template has personal learning-case text outside named slots.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static personal case copy is unrelated to most generated decks.
Static performance claim belongs to the source sample.
Static personal capability claim belongs to the source sample.
Static capability label belongs to the source sample.

portfolio_closing_v1.quality_note: Portfolio closing contact/recommendation text needs explicit contact-slot modeling before generic reuse.

cleanup_patterns.reason: Static personal recommendation quote belongs to the source sample.
Static appendix/contact note belongs to the source sample.
Contact label should be tied to an explicit provided contact slot.
Contact label should be tied to an explicit provided contact slot.
Static personal footer belongs to the source sample.
